title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the question.

questions.task: Compare photographs A and B. Say what the people are doing and how they might be feeling.

script.text: Now I'd like each of you to talk on your own for about a minute. Here are your photographs. They show people in different situations.
I'd like you to compare the photographs and say what the people are doing and how they might be feeling. You have one minute.
Thank you. That's the end of Part 2.
